articles.title: West Bengal hands over 1,024 acres to BSF for fencing along India-Bangladesh border
articles.description: In a significant move, West Bengal has handed over 1,000 acres to the BSF for enhanced border fencing across 172.6 kilometers of the India-Bangladesh border. The Murshidabad district saw the largest portion of land transferred. Moreover, North 24 Parganas and…

articles.title: Jaisalmer sandstorms bury highway, disrupt BSF border routes
articles.description: Three-day sandstorms break 25–30-year record in Jaisalmer, burying Bharatmala highway, disrupting BSF border routes, travel, and crops amid 50 kmph winds.

articles.title: Jammu Frontier sweeps double crown at BSF Inter-Frontier championships
articles.description: Jammu Frontier won overall titles at the 39th BSF Inter-Frontier Aquatic and 49th Cross Country Championships in Indore, leading water polo and swimming.
